\tzpentry{ID5889}{Volume Complete Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5889 introduces Volume Complete Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
$$F(T) = \sum_{n=1}^{\infty} a_n T^n \quad \text{with} \quad a_n \neq 0 \, \forall n$$
